title: The power of choosing you
description: The best glow up isn't physical, it's mental. 🧠✨ Read this if you're tired of pouring into others while you're running empty. #selfgrowth #mindset #healing #wellness

slides.title: The silent shift
slides.description: When you stop chasing and start attracting.

slides.title: You stop <s>explaining</s> yourself
slides.description: Your peace is more important than their opinion.

slides.title: Boundaries become <mark>natural</mark>
slides.description: Saying 'no' to others is saying 'yes' to you'.

slides.title: The noise fades away
slides.description: You finally hear your own intuition again.

slides.title: Quality > <s>Quantity</s>
slides.description: Your circle gets smaller but much deeper.

slides.title: It's time to begin
slides.description: Start today. You are worth the effort.
